var string = "RFP-" + this.campusChoiceCode + "-" + this.transactionTypeCode + "-" + this._request.id;

return string;

script.title: EDT-GetPayeeList
script.description: Get Supplier list based on payee name
script.code:
<?php 
require 'vendor/autoload.php';
use GuzzleHttp\Pool;
use GuzzleHttp\Client;
use GuzzleHttp\Psr7\Request;

$pmHost = getenv('API_HOST');
$pmToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
$pmHeaders = array(
   "Accept: application/json",
   "Authorization: Bearer ". $pmToken,
);

$host_link = getenv('HTTP_HOST');
$request_link = getenv('REQUEST_URI');
$pmToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
$client = new \GuzzleHttp\Client(['base_uri'=>$pmHost, 'verify' => false]);
// $api_folder = '/api/1.0/users';

// $pm4_users = $pmHost.'/collections/23/records/7';
